name: tmax
description: Extensible terminal-based text editor with T-Lisp (Alpha)

scripts.test:daemon: cd test/ui && uv run python run_python_suite.py daemon
scripts.test:ui: cd test/ui && uv run python run_python_suite.py
scripts.test:ui:renderer: cd test/ui && uv run python run_python_suite.py daemon-tmux
scripts.test:ui:helpers: cd test/ui && uv run python tests/test_harness_helpers.py
